author.bio: tech leading #libp2p at @protocollabs | engineer: fixer of some things; breaker of many | PMC @TheASF | biohacker, stoic, hiker, dogs
author.name: Raúl Kripalani

content.text:
A new star is born in the interplanetary sky! 🌟

I'm proud to announce that we've released v0.1 of the Interplanetary Testground project! 🚀🧪👩‍🔬

https://github.com/ipfs/testground/releases/tag/v0.1.0

What is this project about, you may ask?
